cv_text:
Jane Doe — Senior Software Engineer
5 years of experience in Python, FastAPI, and cloud infrastructure (AWS).
Led a team of 4 engineers to build a real-time data pipeline processing 10M events/day.
Skills: Python, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform.
Education: M.Sc. Computer Science, MIT (2019).
Certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate.
job_offer_text:
Senior Backend Engineer — Acme Corp
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale our API platform.
Requirements: 4+ years Python, experience with FastAPI or Django, strong SQL skills, cloud infrastructure (AWS or GCP), familiarity with containerization (Docker/K8s).
Nice to have: Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, real-time data processing.
Stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes.
